title: Small simplification commit seed
task_prompt: Given an overbuilt implementation and task request, choose the smallest correct change and avoid new dependencies or abstractions.
assertions: must prefer deletion/stdlib/native feature when possible
must leave a runnable check for non-trivial logic
license_notes: use permissively licensed subset only; verify source license before redistribution

title: Node.js small merged fixes search seed
task_prompt: Use real small-fix PRs to test whether ponytail avoids over-processing and broad refactors.
assertions: must not run full harness for obvious one-line fix
must state when skipped complexity should be added
license_notes: Node.js MIT; individual PR data public
